title: Dragonscale Mod
description: A minecraft Dragonscale mod which drop 2 from the ender dragon. It's a netherite upgrade
body:
This is my first mod so it may not be too good in quality I just wanted to make a mod and this idea came into my head

You get two dragonscale upon killing the Ender Dragon

This is how you upgrade netherite tools/armor you use one dragonscale and one left dragonscale![(How to upgrade from netherite to dragonscale)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53df91b1d2d8f4c67df23d122d3d6787be11dfc3_0.webp)

![All the items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34e2335f5f5be959ee211955c773c5daa3126ffb.png)
